step_rationale: Wnt antagonist that inhibits EndMT and preserves endothelial stability.
mechanism: sFRP3 antagonizes canonical Wnt signaling, suppressing endothelial-to-mesenchymal transition and maintaining endothelial barrier function during vascular injury.

references.title: Wnt Site Signaling Inhibitor Secreted Frizzled-Related Protein 3 Protects Mitral Valve Endothelium From Myocardial Infarction-Induced Endothelial-to-Mesenchymal Transition.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
